name: Farm Debt Repay Life
short_description: This simulation farm game features randomized resources and bonuses. Cultivate farmland, grow crops, mine minerals, craft tools, and repay your debt through hard work and wit. Along the journey, reside with three feline companions, seek their aid, befriend them, and uncover their secrets!
detailed_description:
Game description : This is a simulation game of managing a farm and planting crops, with totally randomized resource generation and various random gains. You will cultivate farmland, grow crops, mine minerals, smelt minerals, upgrade and make various tools here. But at the same time, you will also face a huge debt that is constantly increasing. You need to work hard to repay the debt. But don't worry, you can get more than 90 kinds of random gains, which will greatly help you increase your earning ability. During this process, you will also live with three cat girls, try to get their help, make friends with them, and explore their secrets!

Game Features :

  • Rich resources, free to explore. You can freely explore here, collecting abundant resources and various minerals in the wild (refreshed once a week) to develop and operate the farm.
  • [/img][b] Reasonable expansion and control of finances. [/b] Although you are carrying a large amount of debt, and the interest will continue to increase (as in reality :)), you can borrow to expand properly, use the borrowed funds to grow rapidly, quickly accumulate wealth, reduce your debt, avoid heavy interest, and eventually become a financial management master. [*][img width="48" height="48"][/img][b] Extract Buff, improve ability. [/b] You can spend a certain amount of money to obtain over 90+ buffs that will increase your ability to pay off debt to an incredible degree, such as reducing the growing time of crops, doubling the value of processed items, getting more fish when fishing, etc...... [/list] [h2][u] Over 100 different kinds of food [/u][/h2] [img width="416" height="224"][/img] [h2][u] More than 20+ crops [/u][/h2] [img width="448" height="288"][/img] [img width="352" height="352"][/img] [h2][u] Over 30+ species of fish [/u][/h2] [img width="192" height="192"]
  • Reasonable expansion and control of finances. Although you are carrying a large amount of debt, and the interest will continue to increase (as in reality :)), you can borrow to expand properly, use the borrowed funds to grow rapidly, quickly accumulate wealth, reduce your debt, avoid heavy interest, and eventually become a financial management master.
  • Extract Buff, improve ability. You can spend a certain amount of money to obtain over 90+ buffs that will increase your ability to pay off debt to an incredible degree, such as reducing the growing time of crops, doubling the value of processed items, getting more fish when fishing, etc......

Over 100 different kinds of food

More than 20+ crops


Over 30+ species of fish


Start your own farm and pay off your debts!
